narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads CSM at 100 on both D1 and H4 in a Risk-Off High regime, driven by hawkish Fed repricing against a backdrop of copper down 3.3% and silver down 7.0% signaling real demand destruction. USDCHF is the cleanest expression with H4 Strong Buy, EURUSD -0.86 correlation confirming, and 1212 H4 momentum at 76 accelerating; USDCAD adds a second leg with H4 Strong Buy and CAD accelerating from 33 to 55 CSM. AUD divergence is the critical alert: D1 CSM 65 versus H4 CSM 26 is a 39-point fade, making AUDUSD longs a trap and AUDJPY H4 momentum fading at 63 a live short setup.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDJPY H4 at 77 rising sharply, USDCHF H4 at 76 rising sharply, USDCAD D1 at 59 trending up
Fading: EURUSD H4 at 16 collapsing, GBPUSD H4 at 18 collapsing, NZDJPY H4 at 40 declining

WATCH
BOJ policy statement hits USDJPY directly; a dovish hold accelerates the D1 Buy signal toward 110 continuation.
UK political crisis escalation targets GBPJPY given its 0.91 correlation to GBPUSD; a new headline breakdown confirms H4 Sell.
Copper next session print affects AUDUSD; a second consecutive leg lower validates the AUD D1-to-H4 CSM collapse and opens AUDUSD short.

themes.theme: US Dollar strength on hawkish Fed repricing and strong economic data
Japanese Yen weakness amid BOJ rate hike expectations
British Pound pressure from UK political crisis
Euro weakness amid risk aversion and Fed policy shifts
Emerging market currency weakness - INR, NZD, AUD, CAD under pressure
Risk-off sentiment with equity profit taking and Asian stock declines
US bond yields surging supporting USD and pressuring commodities
Trump-Xi summit outcome uncertain, supporting risk-off positioning

key_observation: Dominant USD strength driven by hawkish Fed repricing, strong US economic data, and surging yields. Concurrent risk-off sentiment benefiting safe-haven dollar. EM currencies under broad pressure. GBP weakness amplified by political crisis. JPY structurally weak despite BOJ hike expectations. Equities showing resilience on tech earnings but profit-taking evident.
watch: BOJ June rate decision confirmation, further US yield trajectory, Trump-Xi meeting outcomes impact on risk sentiment, GBP political developments, Fed communications, emerging market central bank responses to USD strength
